title: Besh (Korun)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Besh |homeworld=[[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]][[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Haruun Kal''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']], which include Besh's [[Death/Legends|death]] on [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]], to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Korun/Legends|Korun]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Upland Liberation Front]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|If you won't answer us, we'll make sure you never answer anyone else, either.|A Balawai prospector torturing Besh|audio=Besh1.flac|}} '''Besh''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Korun/Legends|Korun]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. Besh fought for the Korun [[Upland Liberation Front]] during the [[Summertime War]] and the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the ruling offworld [[Balawai]] government and its [[Balawai militia|militia]]. During his time in the ULF, Besh served under [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]] and ''[[lor pelek]]'' [[Kar Vastor]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Jedi Master [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] journeyed to Haruun Kal to find Billaba, his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] learner; Windu feared that she had turned to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]. Besh, along with comrades [[Liane Trevval|Chalk]] and [[Nick Rostu]], as well as his brother [[Lesh]], were dispatched by Vastor and Billaba to apprehend Windu and bring him to them. They intercepted him in [[Pelek Baw/Legends|Pelek Baw]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]], and took him with them. Besh did not survive the arduous journey; he was badly injured and later [[Death/Legends|died]] of [[Fungus/Legends|fungal]] infection. ==Biography== ===Joining the Summertime War=== {{Quote|Chalk and Besh are veteran fighters.|Kar Vastor|}} Born on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]], Besh was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Korun/Legends|Korun]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the younger brother of [[Lesh]]. At some point in his life, Besh was captured by several [[Balawai]] [[Jup|prospectors]], who attempted to make him divulge the location of a supposed treasure grove of [[Lammas/Legends|lammas]] [[Tree/Legends|trees]], prized for their valuable wood. Such a grove did not actually exist, but the prospectors nonetheless [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] Besh, cutting off three of his left [[Limb/Legends|hand's]] fingers and ripping out his [[Tongue/Legends|tongue]]. The Korun survived, but nursed a deep hatred for the offworld Balawai and, along with Lesh, joined the [[Summertime War]], an [[Standard year/Legends|annual]] battle between the Korunnai and the offworlders for cultural survival and access to Haruun Kal's bankable resources respectively. ===Escorting a Jedi=== {{Quote|What about Besh and Chalk? You can't just walk out of here and leave them—''"
"''They are in your care now. I could not protect them. I could not even protect myself.|Nick Rostu and Mace Windu|audio=Besh3.flac|}} [[File:Shatterpoint-Scalf-ERC.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Besh was ordered to escort Mace Windu through the jungles of Haruun Kal.]] In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], during the onset of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and at the height of the Summertime War, [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]] was dispatched to Haruun Kal to recruit Korun fighters for [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] actions against the Balawai government, who had allied themselves with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. When she stopped reporting in, her former Master, [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], was fearful of her possibly turning to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]. He traveled to Haruun Kal in a bid to make contact with her. Besh and his fellow fighters [[Nick Rostu]], [[Liane Trevval|Chalk]], and Lesh were ordered by Billaba and ''[[lor pelek]]'' [[Kar Vastor]], both of whom were the commanders of the [[Upland Liberation Front]], a cover organization made up by Billaba, to retrieve Windu. Failing to reach Windu in the planetary [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Pelek Baw/Legends|Pelek Baw]] due to several complications including a [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] riot, Besh and the team eventually managed to help the Jedi Master in a firefight between him and a group of [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]]. The group used Billaba's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] to prove their authenticity to Windu, after which they left Pelek Baw by [[Groundcar/Legends|groundcar]] and traveled into the [[Jungle/Legends|wilderness]]. Several [[Standard day/Legends|days]] later Lesh [[Death/Legends|died]] from [[Wasp Fever|exposure]] to [[Fever wasp/Legends|fever wasps]] due to having chewed raw [[thyssel bark]]. Windu euthanized the hapless Korun, but his [[Medpac/Legends|medpac]] scan also detected that Besh and Chalk were infected, Besh through being stung.{{CSWECite|1|71|Besh}} Windu dosed them with [[thanatizine]] to slow their bodily processes and the development of the wasps inside them. ===Death=== {{Quote|How is he?''"
"''Dying. How are you?|Mace Windu and Chalk discussing Besh's status|}} Besh and Chalk were taken to a former Balawai bunker by Windu. Out of hatred for the Korunnai, Besh and Lesh's unconscious forms were savagely attacked with a crude [[Knife/Legends|blade]] by [[Terrel Nakay]], a Balawai [[Youngling/Legends|boy]] whom Windu had rescued from a [[steamcrawler]] accident near the site. Kar Vastor killed Nakay, but Besh's wounds had been dealt. Despite Vastor's success in expelling the fever wasps from Besh and Chalk, and [[tissue]] binders being applied to their wounds, Besh fell victim to a severe [[Fungus/Legends|fungal]] infection. At the ULF stronghold inside a [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] at the [[Lorshan Pass]], Chalk treated the infection with [[Alcohol/Legends|alcohol]] and Vastor attempted to eliminate the fungus with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], but neither were able to save Besh, and he died soon after. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|''We'' need you. Chalk, you have to trust me—''"
"Did'' trust you, me. So did ''Besh''.|Mace Windu and Chalk|}} Besh was a scarred individual, both mentally and physically; however, this did not prevent him from being expressive and eloquent. He was able to convey his meaning through gestures and messages in the Force, and Mace Windu noted that Besh was the most erudite of his companions. He also enjoyed chewing [[thyssel]] bark, though not in the quantities consumed by his brother Lesh. When Lesh died from fever wasp exposure, Besh was notably upset, with Windu noticing his Force aura shading into despair. Besh was also distressed when he learned that he, too, had been infected. ==Powers and abilities== Besh was able to use the Force to communicate in place of [[Language/Legends|speech]]. He, like other Korunnai, could also form bonds with [[Akk dog/Legends|akk dogs]] and [[grasser]]s, fauna valued by them. ==Behind the scenes== Besh made his first appearance in [[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']], a [[2003]] [[List of books|novel]] by [[Matthew Stover]]. The character later received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' in [[2008]]. The entry states that Kar Vastor butchered Besh, whereas in the novel Vastor tries to heal him. ==Appearances== *[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] {{Ab|Shatterpoint (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book and [[Shatterpoint (abridged audiobook)|abridged audiobook]]}} *[[Shatterpoint (abridged audiobook)|''Shatterpoint'' abridged audiobook]] ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Besh }} [[Category:Korunnai]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Resistance fighters]] [[Category:Soldiers]]
